headline: Expedia Group Unlocks Sports Tourism Demand Forecasting Through PredictHQ Partnership
summary: SEATTLE, March 02, 2026--Expedia Group today announced a new partnership with PredictHQ, the leading provider of real-world context, integrating its verified event signals and predictive demand intelligence directly into Partner Central,1 the platform lodging partners use to manage their business. The integration gives lodging partners a clearer view of rising travel demand by combining PredictHQ’s forward-looking demand forecasts with Expedia Group’s rich traveler insights, empowering them to i

content.title: Expedia Group Unlocks Sports Tourism Demand Forecasting Through PredictHQ Partnership
content.summary: SEATTLE, March 02, 2026--Expedia Group today announced a new partnership with PredictHQ, the leading provider of real-world context, integrating its verified event signals and predictive demand intelligence directly into Partner Central,1 the platform lodging partners use to manage their business. The integration gives lodging partners a clearer view of rising travel demand by combining PredictHQ’s forward-looking demand forecasts with Expedia Group’s rich traveler insights, empowering them to i

thumbnail.caption: New joint forecasts project total traveler spend across North America’s host cities to exceed $8.1 billion USD between June and August 2026 - nearly $750 million higher than last year
